subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-11-16
subcodes.first_line: The holy Manifestations endured great afflictions and persecutions and at every moment accepted torment and oppression.... Divine religions consist of two parts... Gracious God! Although people see with their own eyes that in the dispensation of Christ the eleven disciples were ordinary men
subcodes.first_line_orig: مظاهر مقدسه تحمل بلایا و مصائب عظیمه فرمودند و قبول زجر و جفا در هر دمی نمودند حضرت مسیح مبتلای بلایا شدیده گردید
subcodes.subjects: @early Christian persecutions; the Pharisees, @changing and unchanging parts of religion, @suffering and imprisonment, @apostles; early disciples of Christ, @spiritual transformation, @martyrs and martyrdom
